run_summary: Screen 2 faces a critical timing gate: MDB's earnings print (2026-05-28) is imminent — likely TODAY or tomorrow — placing it at or past T+1 exit discipline. GTLB clears the holding window (print 2026-06-02, 4 trading days out) and thesis remains intact. Both are UNDERDONE conf-3 flags from a screen with a 0% hit rate on UNDERDONE calls (n=1), but the positions are already sized and the thesis reads remain coherent.

entries.name: GitLab
entries.thesis: The May 11 pre-announcement is a deliberate de-risking move by management — they would not have reaffirmed guidance and announced a RIF (typically a negative-perception event) 3 weeks before print unless Q1 was tracking at or above plan. Combined with the buyback authorization and the FY26 cash flow inflection (-8% to +24% OCF margin) plus 26% growth in $1M+ ARR cohort, the filings posture is meaningfully more constructive than a stock that has had multiple CFO transitions (Robins out Sept 2025, Shen interim, Ross arriving Jan 2026) and a securities class action overhang would typically suggest.
entries.what_kills: NDR drops further below 118% reported in FY26 (already down from 123% prior year); large enterprise deals slip; Duo Agent Platform (GA Jan 2026) shows weak early monetization data; RIF framed defensively rather than reinvestment-driven on the call.
entries.reasoning: Position already held in this screen's portfolio (56 shares, 3.54% unrealized gain). Screen 2 discipline does not add to existing positions within a holding window. The flag's classification and thesis remain valid, but execution is blocked by existing exposure.

entries.name: MongoDB
entries.thesis: Atlas mix expansion (66%→70%→73% of revenue over three years) and a sharp net-loss reduction in FY26 ($71M vs $129M) suggest underlying durability the market may be under-crediting given the CEO transition overhang. The Q3 10-Q's 'slower than historical' Atlas language was not escalated into a new/refreshed risk factor in the FY26 10-K, which is a small derisking tell.
entries.what_kills: Desai using his first print to reset/kitchen-sink FY27 guidance; Atlas consumption growth decelerating again or NRR falling below 120%; AI-application Atlas tailwind narrative weakening in management commentary.
entries.reasoning: Position already held in this screen's portfolio (4 shares, -3.49% unrealized loss). Screen 2 discipline does not add to existing positions within a holding window. The earnings print (2026-05-28) is imminent and the position is being exited per T+1 rule in the position_decisions section above.
